profile: Informatics student at Université Côte d'Azur (BSc finishing summer 2026); Erasmus at Universidad Complutense de Madrid. Focused on high-performance algorithms, robust systems, and automation, with interests in ML reliability and tooling. Built enterprise data-sync workflows and research-grade ML scaffolds.

education.description: Active participant in the Facultad de Informática, focusing on advanced computing and international collaboration.
Ranked 5th in the cohort (previous academic year). Core coursework in algorithms, data structures, and software architecture.

highlights: Built a three-tier service syncing DHL datasets with client systems.
Automated file reconciliation to cut manual errors at scale.
Improved data quality checks across high-volume batch jobs.
Taught bachelor cohorts in Mathematics and Informatics.
Prepared exercises on algorithms and data structures.

customSections.title: Robustness & Algorithmic Projects
customSections.content:
• HetGNN & Self-Healing: PyTorch system to preserve GNN stability under structural shocks, using dual-ascent optimization with recovery metrics, ablation tracking, and stress-test suites.
  • RandLin Diagnostics: Matrix-free checks for randomized linear algebra estimators, producing calibration and variance reports.
  • DetGraph: CLI for detecting structural shifts in graphs, monitoring drift over time with spectral statistics.

customSections.title: Systems & Tools
customSections.content:
• Resumake: Print-optimized TypeScript/React resume builder with A4 overflow detection and sharing.
  • Riddle Game: 2D Java game built with an ECS-style architecture and tooling.

customSections.title: Certificates & Honors
customSections.content:
• HTE geNIUS Program: Italian Institute of Technology (Strategy & Bio-Tech Research).
  • HackerRank: Java & Problem Solving Certificates.
  • Community AI ML Course (2021).
